tagline: Reliable Pool Service in Salt Lake City

hero.headline:
Your Family Pool, Our Family
Promise
hero.subheadline: You bought a pool to make memories, not to spend weekends testing chemicals. SLC Pool Service keeps your water crystal clear so you can focus on what matters most — just dive in.

services.label: Our Services
services.headline: Complete Pool Care From<br class="hidden md:block"> Startup to Season's End
services.subtitle: From brand-new plaster to emergency repairs, our certified technicians handle every aspect of pool ownership so you never have to worry.

cards.title: Pool Startup Service
cards.description: The first 28 days matter most. We ensure perfect plaster curing, balanced water chemistry, and a flawless beginning for your new pool.

cards.title: Weekly Cleaning & Maintenance
cards.description: Skimming, vacuuming, brushing, equipment checks, and chemistry balancing. Your pool stays swim-ready every single week, guaranteed.

cards.title: Equipment Repair & Install
cards.description: Pumps, heaters, filters, salt systems, and automation. Pentair-authorized repairs and installations completed fast and done right.

cards.title: Water Chemistry Management
cards.description: Orenda-certified chemical balancing for water that's safe, clear, and gentle on skin. No red eyes, no guesswork, just science.

cards.title: Diagnostics & Troubleshooting
cards.description: Something not right? Our technicians use professional diagnostic tools to pinpoint and resolve pool system issues quickly and accurately.

cards.title: Emergency Repairs
cards.description: Equipment failure on a holiday weekend? We offer quick-response emergency service to get your pool back up and running fast.

how_it_works.headline: Three Steps to a Worry-Free Pool

steps.title: Tell Us About Your Pool
steps.description: Call or fill out the form below. We'll provide an honest, no-pressure quote within 24 hours. No contracts, no commitments — just straightforward pricing.

steps.title: We Take Care of Everything
steps.description: Our licensed, certified technicians arrive on schedule. Cleaning, chemistry, equipment checks, and backyard tidying — all covered, every visit.

steps.title: Enjoy Crystal Clear Water
steps.description: Your pool stays sparkling, safe, and swim-ready all season long. If something isn't right, we come back and fix it — no charge.

about.label: Why SLC Trusts Us
about.headline: Family-Owned, Brand-Certified, and Obsessed With Quality
about.description: Since 2021, SLC Pool Service has been the Wasatch Front's go-to team for pool care done right. We're the service provider California Pools trusts with their clients' pools, and we're certified partners with Pentair, Fluidra, Jandy, and Orenda. Every pool we touch gets the same care we'd give our own backyard.

features.title: Licensed & Insured Technicians
features.description: Every technician is fully licensed, insured, and factory-trained by the brands we install and service.

features.title: Transparent Pricing, Always
features.description: You'll know exactly what you're paying before we start. No surprise fees, no hidden costs, no pressure to upsell.

features.title: Satisfaction Guaranteed
features.description: Not happy with a visit? We'll come back and make it right at no additional charge. That's our family promise.

pricing.headline: Transparent Pricing. Zero Surprises.
pricing.subtitle: Choose the plan that fits your pool. Upgrade, downgrade, or cancel anytime — no long-term contracts required.

guarantee.headline: Our "Crystal Clear" Guarantee
guarantee.description: If you're not 100% satisfied with any service visit, call us within 24 hours and we'll come back to make it right — completely free. No questions, no hassle. We stake our family reputation on every pool we service, and we won't rest until your water is perfect.

faqs.question: How quickly can you start servicing my pool?
faqs.answer: Most new clients in the Salt Lake City area are scheduled within 3-5 business days. For equipment emergencies, we offer same-day or next-day response. Just call +1 801-808-1581 and we'll get you on the schedule.

faqs.question: Do you handle new pool startups?
faqs.answer: Absolutely. Our 28-day pool startup service ensures proper plaster curing and balanced chemistry from day one. We're the team California Pools trusts with their new builds across the Wasatch Front.

faqs.question: What brands do you service and install?
faqs.answer: We're authorized partners with Pentair, Fluidra, Jandy, and Orenda. That means factory-trained technicians, genuine parts, and full manufacturer warranty support on repairs and installations.

faqs.question: Are you licensed and insured?
faqs.answer: Yes. Every technician on our team is fully licensed, insured, and certified. We carry comprehensive liability coverage for your peace of mind and ours.

faqs.question: Do you service commercial pools?
faqs.answer: We do. We service residential and commercial pools across the Greater Wasatch Front, including HOA communities, fitness centers, and resort properties. Contact us for a custom commercial quote.

testimonials.name: Michael B.
testimonials.text: SLC Pool Service is our go-to service provider. They maintain our pools year-round, ensuring they remain pristine and ready for our clients. Their commitment to excellence and expertise is unmatched.

testimonials.name: Long-term Client
testimonials.text: Trey and Ryan have been caring for our pool since 2021. The water is crystal clear, the system works perfectly, and their team always shows up with a great attitude. Couldn't ask for more.

testimonials.name: Sarah M.
testimonials.text: They helped us through every step with our new pool startup on new plaster. They handle the Pentair warranty which has come in handy on multiple occasions. Very knowledgeable and always responsive.
